arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester United may be on different levels right now, but they are likely to be going for the same high-level targets in 2025....

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim is taking Manchester United risk which could set his initial progress back
arts.sum: Man United have used 21 different starters under Ruben Amorim so far as he searches for his best XI.

arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Nottingham Forest live on Sky: Defensive duo out for Amorim
arts.sum: United head into Saturday’s match after the sad news of popular receptionist Kath Phipps ’ death at the age of 85. United will pay tribute to Phipps at Saturday’s match against Forest, although their exact plans have yet to be confirmed.

arts.ttl: Manchester United eyeing move for versatile Premier League attacker with 20 goals & 13 assists
arts.sum: Manchester United are among the clubs watching highly-rated Southampton winger, Tyler Dibling. It has been previously reported that United director Dan Ashworth is one of the key figures driving the club’s transfer pursuit of Dibling after also consistently monitoring him when he was at Newcastle. arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag's former player picks out two mistakes that cost him Man Utd job
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag was sacked by Manchester United in October amid the club's poor Premier League form and was ultimately replaced by Ruben Amorim at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Chelsea handed boost as Amorim targets huge Man Utd deal
arts.sum: Manchester United have reportedly rekindled their interest in Crystal Palace defender Marc Guehi ahead of the January transfer window. The Blues included a 20% sell-on clause in Guehi’s Crystal Palace contract and they could therefore earn as much as €18 million if Oliver Glasner’s side continue to demand a total fee of €90m for the England star.

arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho's Premier League Chelsea title race stance leaves sour taste after Man United move

arts.ttl: Man United legend reveals the one trait that Ruben Amorim has which could make him a success at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Amorim is looking to transform United's fortunes after succeeding Erik ten Hag as the club's head coach. There is much work for Amorim to do, with United currently in 13th place in the table.
